_readme: Local Authority District (LAD) -> ITL1/ITL2/ITL3 area names. Source: ONS Open Geography Portal, 'LAD (April 2023) to LAU1 to ITL3 to ITL2 to ITL1 (January 2021) Lookup in the UK' (https://geoportal.statistics.gov.uk/). 'byLad' is keyed by LAD GSS code (postcodes.io's codes.admin_district); deliberately not keyed by postcodes.io's own codes.nuts, which turned out to be a different vintage/numbering for Scotland and Wales (silently wrong/missing ITL2, e.g. Cardiff/Edinburgh). 'byName' is a fallback keyed by lowercased LAD name (postcodes.io's admin_district) for the rare case where even LAD GSS codes have drifted between vintages (observed for Sheffield: E08000019 here vs E08000039 from postcodes.io) — LAD names are far more stable than either code scheme. Northern Ireland's 11 LAD entries are included for completeness but unused in practice — NI postcodes are handled via data/ni-postcode-sample.json, whose district names match these LAD names directly.
